tasks.label: 📚 Publish Spike Editor
args: $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; if (!(Test-Path 'docs')) { New-Item -Path 'docs' -ItemType Directory | Out-Null }; if (!(Test-Path 'docs/utils')) { New-Item -Path 'docs/utils' -ItemType Directory -Force | Out-Null }; Copy-Item 'index.html' 'docs/index.html' -Force; Copy-Item 'Training Camp.html' 'docs/Training Camp.html' -Force; Copy-Item 'Class Library.html' 'docs/Class Library.html' -Force; Copy-Item 'Videos.html' 'docs/Videos.html' -Force; Copy-Item 'utils/utils.js' 'docs/utils/utils.js' -Force; git add .; git commit -m 'Publish-Spike-Editor' 2>$null; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { Write-Host 'ℹ️ No new changes to commit.' -ForegroundColor Yellow }; git push origin main; Write-Host '✅ Published all 4 tabs!' -ForegroundColor Green
